hindi.title: Raakh
hindi.overview: When two teenagers vanish, a close-knit family is shattered and the city is left on edge. Determined to uncover the truth, a relentless officer leads a nationwide manhunt that pulls him deep into a world of violence and human depravity.

hindi.title: Alliance
hindi.overview: A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare. Sixteen celebrities are split into four teams, battling through physical and mental challenges to earn points-the only currency inside a mysterious HQ run by the System. Face the Ace's power, survive weekly votes, and rebuild alliances every reset.

hindi.title: Tavvai
hindi.overview: In 1880, A Maharaj through his atrocities invited Tavvai. The village is terrified for generations until a chosen one sets things right.

hindi.title: Pritam and Pedro
hindi.overview: The dynamic between the two contrasting personalities, a seasoned cop who prefers old-school methods and a tech-savvy cop who relies on modern technology for investigations, as they navigate their partnership in solving crimes.

hindi.title: Ikka
hindi.overview: With a loved one's life at stake, a celebrated lawyer must defend a man he suspects is guilty — battling his conscience every step of the way.

english.title: Disclosure Day
english.overview: A cybersecurity expert becomes a whistleblower after uncovering secrets about aliens, putting him on the run from a corporation. Meanwhile, a meteorologist experiencing strange phenomena joins forces with him to prove there's life beyond our understanding.

english.title: Your Fault: London
english.overview: Nick and Noah are both embarking on life-changing adventures that are threatening to pull them apart—Nick in business with his father and Noah starting a fresh chapter at Oxford University. Now living separate lives, and meeting new people, they find themselves entangled in temptations, rivalries, and betrayals and their bond is tested like never before. As secrets unravel and temptation rises, they must fight to hold onto each other—or risk losing everything.

english.title: Little Brother
english.overview: A tightly wound realtor's picture-perfect life gets an extreme makeover when his lovably chaotic "little brother" suddenly reappears.

english.title: Enola Holmes 3
english.overview: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

english.title: Elle
english.overview: Before Elle Woods was a fish-out-of-water at Harvard, we meet her in 1995 in the tumultuous waters of high school where she encounters tricky friendships, forbidden romance, and questionable fashion choices. In this unexpected chapter of her adolescence, we learn about the experiences that shaped Elle into the iconic young woman we've come to know and love.

english.title: The Westies
english.overview: As the Javits Center construction project ignites a battle for profit in early 1980s Hell's Kitchen, a generational rift threatens the uneasy peace between violent Irish gang the Westies and the Mafia, and draws FBI heat.

english.title: Murder 101
english.overview: Part teen drama, part masterclass, and part edge-of-your-seat crime investigation, follow a high school sociology class in rural Tennessee who help revive a decades-old case into a present-day hunt for a killer.

english.title: On Purpose with Jay Shetty
english.overview: One of the most popular podcasts in the world, On Purpose features in-depth conversations with influential voices across culture, wellness, and personal growth.

english.title: Lucky
english.overview: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

english.title: Ride or Die
english.overview: Best friends Debbie and Judith are forced on the run when Debbie discovers Judith isn't a forensic accountant, she's an international assassin! With a mysterious figure chasing them, and Debbie's husband involved in something deeply corrupt, it's a race against time and a road trip across Europe to untangle the truth and stay alive.

english.title: The Hawk
english.overview: On the back nine of his career, golf legend Lonnie "The Hawk" Hawkins chases one final major — and drags everyone he loves into the chaos.

english.title: Heartstopper Forever
english.overview: It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

english.title: A Toxic Love Story
english.overview: A string of threatening emails escalates into a revenge plot involving a newly married US marshal and his ex-girlfriend.

english.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
english.overview: Comic book store owner Stuart Bloom is tasked with restoring reality after he breaks a device built by Sheldon and Leonard, accidentally bringing about a multiverse Armageddon. Stuart is aided in this quest by his girlfriend Denise, geologist friend Bert, and quantum physicist/all-around pain in the ass Barry Kripke.

english.title: Come Dine With Me: Celebrity Philippines
english.overview: A group of celebrities take turns hosting their own dinner parties and grading each other. Over the week they battle for the title of best host, and the chance to win a grand cash prize for their chosen charity.

popular.title: Sing Geetham
popular.overview: In an isolated village, young Prathap seeks opportunity but enters a world of deception. Drawn into uncontrollable forces, he's caught between progress and preservation, testing his beliefs and purpose.

popular.title: Moondram Kan
popular.overview: Follows the investigation of a factory general manager's murder, where four workers—a mechanic, assistant manager, owner, and new recruit—become the primary suspects.

popular.title: Kotha Malupu
popular.overview: Set in a lively village, a budding romance takes unexpected turns as love, secrets and misunderstandings collide. What begins as a light-hearted journey soon spirals into a suspenseful tale filled with twists, emotions and surprising revelations

popular.title: Transfer Trimurthulu
popular.overview: Fearless cop Trimurthulu's chance find drags him into a web of conspiracy. Standing alone against influential enemies who will stop at nothing, he risks everything to expose the truth and deliver justice.

popular.title: Lingam
popular.overview: Framed for a crime he didn't commit, a kabaddi hero gets pushed into a world he never wanted and ultimately becomes a feared name.

popular.title: Con City
popular.overview: Follows a struggling family whose lives change when a receipt printer starts generating money after a lightning strike, leading to public chaos when society discovers the money-making machine.

popular.title: Super Subbu
popular.overview: An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?

popular.title: Isakapatnam
popular.overview: Set in the 1990s, in the ruthless port town of Isakapatnam, three forces collide—a woman driven by justice, a henchman torn by loyalty, and a common man hungry for revenge—each closing in on the empire built by the port’s most powerful man, Naidu.

popular.title: Muthassi
popular.overview: In a remote village haunted by ancient secrets, a mother's love is put to the ultimate test when her son becomes entangled in a terrifying supernatural curse.

popular.title: I'm Not Afraid
popular.overview: 10-year-old Miguel stumbles upon a terrifying secret involving a boy trapped in a hole near his home.

popular.title: Land of Football
popular.overview: From the mud-slicked night tournaments to the World Cup flex-board wars, this is a deep dive into the obsessive and deep-rooted football culture of Kerala.

popular.title: The East Palace
popular.overview: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

popular.title: Elite Force
popular.overview: Following an unprecedented attack on the GIGN, an officer—just as he is leaving the force—will carry out a mission that rivals the intensity of that attack.

popular.title: Jana Nayagan
popular.overview: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before. Years later, a child’s silent fear ignites the past, drawing a former police officer into a battle far bigger than personal revenge.

hindi.title: Musafir Cafe
hindi.overview: Chander feels an undeniable connection with Sudha. Years later, he builds a new life in the hills with Preeti, but memories of the past linger.

hindi.title: Adarsh Baal Vidyalaya
hindi.overview: A relaxed principal tries to reform a failing public school, triggering a messy transformation as misfit teachers work to repair the system one lesson at a time.

hindi.title: Apology
hindi.overview: Three friends find themselves in an unprecedented search for an unknown man around their hometown.

english.title: The Dink
english.overview: Desperate to save a struggling country club and earn his father's respect, a washed-up tennis pro is compelled to break a sacred vow and do the unthinkable: play pickleball.

english.title: 72 HOURS
english.overview: To save his career, a 40-year-old ad exec joins a crew of twentysomethings for a wild Miami bachelor party after they mistakenly add him to a group chat.

english.title: Breaking Bear
english.overview: The escapades of three bear siblings who decide they have to start selling drugs in order to raise money and save their home after gas companies start fracking next to their cave. The bears soon enlist other forest animals in a scheme that will pit them against oil companies, The Russian Mafia, local Hell’s Angels and polar bears who hate anything that isn’t white.

english.title: Drag Race Down Under vs The World
english.overview: Fan-favourites from Drag Race Down Under go head-to-head with sickening queens from around the world — all vying for the ultimate crown. Get ready for new looks, louder drama, and legendary lip-syncs as the battle for global drag dominance begins.

english.title: Triple Decker
english.overview: Over the course of one bizarre day, a couple with a dangerous plan and a stranger with her own agenda find their lives colliding in the most unexpected ways. As secrets simmer beneath the surface, everything quickly spirals into a wild mix of chaos, dark humor, and perfectly timed misfortune—where every move only makes things worse.

english.title: Locker Diaries: Descendants
english.overview: Glimpse the drama happening in the school hallways of Auradon Prep and discover the secret adventures that unfold.

english.title: BROADCAST_586
english.overview: Bureau of Paranormal Phenomena looks into the case of a mysterious broadcast that might have possibly led to the deaths of 4 families in the town of Lander in May 1986.

english.title: Furious
english.overview: FBI agent Alice Black is on the hunt for a mysterious and calculating female serial killer. Both walk their own paths toward justice, and as their lives start to intertwine, the line between right and wrong begins to blur.

english.title: THE COLLECTOR
english.overview: A quiet, deadpan craftsman treats his ordinary collection of stones with the serene precision of a master artist, turning a mysterious, dark trade into a highly disciplined science.

english.title: The Idaho Murders: College Nightmare
english.overview: Chronicles one of the most chilling murder cases in recent memory — honoring the four young lives that were taken while tracing every step from the night of the killings to the eventual arrest of a suspect.

popular.title: Pallichattambi
popular.overview: Small-town schemer Chattambi survives by staying ahead of his neighbors through risky plans. When his plans backfire, he has to depend on extricating himself from the mess he created.

popular.title: Soy Luna: Let's Roll Again
popular.overview: After an accident that sidelined her, Luna returns to her beloved Jam & Roller. Putting on her skates again won't be easy, especially when a hidden villain's plan starts to complicate her life. She'll also face a dilemma, torn between old flames. Amidst songs, adventures, and reunions with friends, Luna will have to overcome many obstacles to fulfill her dream.

popular.title: Bloody Smart
popular.overview: In a town where strict rules shape students into their “best selves,” a hidden Bloodfruit Tree bears crimson fruit. A mysterious boy in black delivers these fruits only to those who truly “need” them. Once received, they awaken long-suppressed desires—gently unraveling the heart, and quietly leading the town toward irreversible collapse.

popular.title: Warota!
popular.overview:
It is a sketch comedy series starring SixTONES, marking the group’s first attempt at comedy as a unit. The show features a range of formats, including situational sketches, short skits, and serialized comedy segments, all performed on full-scale, professionally designed sets.

In each episode, SixTONES collaborate with guest actors and emerging creators, taking on various scripts and creative directions. Through these performances, the members showcase their distinct personalities as they engage in dynamic and often chaotic comedic interactions. The series offers a unique side of SixTONES that is exclusive to this program.

hindi.title: Made in India: A Titan Story
hindi.overview: In a market ruled by smuggling and foreign brands, a determined Indian man Xerxes Desai, with the help of his team, dares to build a world-class watch from scratch. Battling rejection, failure, and global humiliation, they transform Titan into a symbol of national pride and innovation.

hindi.title: Maa Behen
hindi.overview: In this dark comedy, a woman calls her estranged daughters in the middle of the night with chilling news — there's a dead body in her kitchen.

hindi.title: Raakh
hindi.overview: When two teenagers vanish, a close-knit family is shattered and the city is left on edge. Determined to uncover the truth, a relentless officer leads a nationwide manhunt that pulls him deep into a world of violence and human depravity.

hindi.overview: A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare. hindi.title: Baby Do Die Do
hindi.overview: A deaf and mute serial killer in Mumbai can only hear her dead sister's voice as she commits murders for mysterious reasons.

hindi.title: Ikka
hindi.overview: With a loved one's life at stake, a celebrated lawyer must defend a man he suspects is guilty — battling his conscience every step of the way.

hindi.title: Chand Mera Dil
hindi.overview: Aarav and Chandni's passionate college romance is struck by adulthood far too soon, forcing the two young lovers to balance their ambitions with responsibility and realize the evolved meaning of love.

hindi.title: Simulacra
hindi.overview: Nayan desperately attempts to help Nivi, who has been completely wiped blank, remember the profound past they once shared together.

english.title: Office Romance
english.overview: Jackie, President and CEO of Air Cruz, runs a tight ship in her business, including a rigid anti-fraternization policy for all her employees. When a new sexy lawyer begins working for her, that policy becomes very tested.

english.title: Your Fault: London
english.overview: Nick and Noah are both embarking on life-changing adventures that are threatening to pull them apart—Nick in business with his father and Noah starting a fresh chapter at Oxford University. Now living separate lives, and meeting new people, they find themselves entangled in temptations, rivalries, and betrayals and their bond is tested like never before. As secrets unravel and temptation rises, they must fight to hold onto each other—or risk losing everything.

In this unexpected chapter of her adolescence, we learn about the experiences that shaped Elle into the iconic young woman we've come to know and love.

english.overview: As the Javits Center construction project ignites a battle for profit in early 1980s Hell's Kitchen, a generational rift threatens the uneasy peace between violent Irish gang the Westies and the Mafia, and draws FBI heat.

english.title: Murder 101
english.overview: Part teen drama, part masterclass, and part edge-of-your-seat crime investigation, follow a high school sociology class in rural Tennessee who help revive a decades-old case into a present-day hunt for a killer.

english.title: On Purpose with Jay Shetty
english.overview: One of the most popular podcasts in the world, On Purpose features in-depth conversations with influential voices across culture, wellness, and personal growth.

english.title: Ride or Die
english.overview: Best friends, Judith and Debbie, know everything about each other … well, almost everything. Judith has been living a double life that Debbie knows nothing about: she is a highly trained assassin. When a hit goes horribly wrong, Judith and Debbie must go on the run together and work to repair their broken friendship—all while being targeted by a mysterious enemy who wants them dead. And only together, can they solve this layered mystery.

english.title: Heartstopper Forever
english.overview: It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

english.title: The F Ward
english.overview: Failed medical interns get their last shot at Sydney’s underfunded Pines Hospital, where they battle to overcome personal shortcomings and past mistakes in the hope of finally becoming doctors.

english.title: Young Farts Trailer Parts
english.overview: Small-town brothers Jagger and Dawson run Young Farts RV Parts, a multi-million-dollar business where they turn trailer trash into cash. Between outrageous schemes, chaotic stunts, and big-hearted hijinks, these brothers chase one wild idea after the next - all for the love of their family and the empire they’re building.

english.title: What Krishna Saw
english.overview: A documentary exploring the relationship between devotion, dairy, and modern Hindu practice through the lens of Krishna consciousness in contemporary India.  In the excuse of God, we have institutionalized a contradiction. "What Krishna Saw" investigates the profound disconnect between the ancient, revered sanctity of the cow in Hindu tradition and the stark realities of the modern, industrial dairy complex that fuels today's rituals.

popular.title: Peddi
popular.overview: In a village that doesn't officially exist, a laborer's unmatched athletic talent becomes his weapon to fight for his people's right to be recognized.

popular.title: Mollywood Times
popular.overview: Vineeth Madhavan tries hard to become Malayalam cinema's greatest horror filmmaker, but will the toxic industry affect his dream?

popular.title: Viral Hit
popular.overview: A bullied high schooler becomes an overnight sensation after a viral video. But when his newfound fame turns sour, he must learn to fight for himself.

popular.overview: Fearless cop Trimurthulu's chance find drags him into a web of conspiracy. Standing alone against influential enemies who will stop at nothing, he risks everything to expose the truth and deliver justice.

popular.title: Criminal
popular.overview: A random mass stabbing, major food company Titus Foods, and a mysterious infant disease. These three things have as much in common as Detective Soma, hack writer Yarimizu, and the stabbing's lone survivor, Shuji. Yet, these men are now embroiled in a risky quest for the truth. What they find, though, is more heinous than they imagined, making them question just who is the real criminal?

popular.title: Cyborg 009 Nemesis
popular.overview: Since their inception, the cyborg soldiers have protected humanity from various enemies threatening peace for over half a century. Yet the battle continues—a group of nine cyborgs called "Nemesis" convinced that 009 and his comrades alone cannot bring peace to the world has emerged. Led by Graviton, the cyborg who manipulates gravity, what is their ultimate goal? Will we witness a generational change!?

english.title: Young Farts Trailer Parts
english.overview: Small-town brothers Jagger and Dawson run Young Farts RV Parts, a multi-million-dollar business where they turn trailer trash into cash. Between outrageous schemes, chaotic stunts, and big-hearted hijinks, these brothers chase one wild idea after the next - all for the love of their family and the empire they’re building.

english.title: The F Ward
english.overview: Failed medical interns get their last shot at Sydney’s underfunded Pines Hospital, where they battle to overcome personal shortcomings and past mistakes in the hope of finally becoming doctors.

english.title: What Krishna Saw
english.overview: A documentary exploring the relationship between devotion, dairy, and modern Hindu practice through the lens of Krishna consciousness in contemporary India.  In the excuse of God, we have institutionalized a contradiction. "What Krishna Saw" investigates the profound disconnect between the ancient, revered sanctity of the cow in Hindu tradition and the stark realities of the modern, industrial dairy complex that fuels today's rituals.

english.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
english.overview: Comic book store owner Stuart Bloom is tasked with restoring reality after he breaks a device built by Sheldon and Leonard, accidentally bringing about a multiverse Armageddon. Stuart is aided in this quest by his girlfriend Denise, geologist friend Bert, and quantum physicist/all-around pain in the ass Barry Kripke.

popular.title: Maa Inti Bangaram
popular.overview: Through both her moments of fear and bravery, a woman discovers that embracing her vulnerabilities is as vital to her inner strength as facing challenges head-on.

popular.title: The East Palace
popular.overview: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

popular.title: The Map of Longing
popular.overview: Before her death, Lucy creates a game for her sister, Greta, pushing her into a journey of self-discovery — and toward the charming Will Tucker.

popular.title: Transfer Trimurthulu
popular.overview: Fearless cop Trimurthulu's chance find drags him into a web of conspiracy. Standing alone against influential enemies who will stop at nothing, he risks everything to expose the truth and deliver justice.

popular.title: Cyborg 009 Nemesis
popular.overview: Since their inception, the cyborg soldiers have protected humanity from various enemies threatening peace for over half a century. Yet the battle continues—a group of nine cyborgs called "Nemesis" convinced that 009 and his comrades alone cannot bring peace to the world has emerged. Led by Graviton, the cyborg who manipulates gravity, what is their ultimate goal? Will we witness a generational change!?
